class UserProfile:
    def __init__(self, user_id: int):
        self.user_id = user_id
        self.first_name = ""
        self.last_name = ""
        self.email = ""
        self.phone = ""
        self.address_line1 = ""
        self.address_line2 = ""
        self.city = ""
        self.state = ""
        self.zip_code = ""
        self.country = ""
        self.avatar_url = ""
        self.bio = ""
        self.timezone = ""
        self.language = ""
        self.theme = "light"
        self.notifications_enabled = True
        self.two_factor_enabled = False
        self.created_at = None
        self.updated_at = None
        self.last_login = None
        self.login_count = 0
        self.is_active = True
        self.role = "user"
        self.preferences = {}
        self.metadata = {}

    def update_profile(self, data: dict):
        self.first_name = data.get("first_name", self.first_name)
        self.last_name = data.get("last_name", self.last_name)
        self.email = data.get("email", self.email)
        self.phone = data.get("phone", self.phone)
        self.address_line1 = data.get("address_line1", self.address_line1)
        self.city = data.get("city", self.city)
        self.state = data.get("state", self.state)
        self.zip_code = data.get("zip_code", self.zip_code)
        self.country = data.get("country", self.country)
        self.updated_at = data.get("updated_at", self.updated_at)
